query: How do I create a quick spray paint resist with a stencil?

incompletion_cues: Coverage is incomplete

steps.text: Let the paint dry, remove the stencil, and inspect the resist.
completion_cues: Paint has dried

incompletion_cues: Paint is still wet

White paper is placed and smoothed flat.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Position the stencil on the paper.

completion_evidence: The floral stencil is aligned on the paper.
Tape is being applied along the lower edge.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Some stencil edges still need to be pressed and secured.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Press the stencil flat and secure the remaining lifted edges.

completion_evidence: Additional tape is pressed around the stencil perimeter.

sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Shake the spray can and apply a light even coat.

completion_evidence: An even black spray coat covers the stencil area.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The stencil remains attached, so the final resist is not revealed.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Let the paint dry fully, then remove the tape and lift the stencil.

query: How do I put a harness on a dog?

goal: Place and adjust a correctly oriented harness on the dog with a secure, comfortable fit.

steps.text: Identify the harness orientation, open the fasteners, and loosen the straps as needed.
completion_cues: The harness is oriented and open enough to put on without force.
incompletion_cues: The harness is twisted, closed, or too tight to place safely.

steps.text: Guide the harness onto the dog and position it around the neck, chest, and legs as designed.
completion_cues: The harness lies in the intended position on the dog's body.
incompletion_cues: The harness is off the dog, misplaced, or being forced.

steps.text: Connect all required buckles or clips.
completion_cues: All designed closures are fully engaged.
incompletion_cues: A required buckle remains open or incorrectly connected.

steps.text: Adjust the straps and check for a snug, untwisted, comfortable fit.
completion_cues: The harness is secure, untwisted, and has appropriate clearance.
incompletion_cues: The fit is loose, restrictive, twisted, or unchecked.

completion_evidence: A stuffed dog is placed upright on the table and a red harness is picked up and spread between both hands.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The harness is still being examined and has not been opened or placed on the dog.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Identify the neck and body openings, release the closures, and loosen the straps before placement.

completion_evidence: After an unsuccessful tight placement attempt, the harness is removed from the stuffed dog.
The person then works the red strap through its adjuster to enlarge the opening.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The harness is still off the dog and strap loosening is ongoing.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Finish loosening the opening, confirm the straps are untwisted, and guide the harness on without force.

completion_evidence: The harness has been substantially loosened and oriented flat before a new placement attempt.
It is now positioned around the stuffed dog's neck and chest while the person manipulates the side closures.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The hands remain on the buckle area and a fully connected, untwisted fit has not yet been demonstrated.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Finish engaging each required closure, then smooth and adjust the straps before checking clearance.

completion_evidence: The person inspects the harness position around the neck and chest, then removes it to work the strap through an adjuster.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: At the end of the interval the adjusted harness is entirely off the dog, so closure and fit cannot be confirmed.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Complete the off-dog strap adjustment, replace the harness in the correct orientation, and fasten all closures before checking fit.

sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Release the detector from the mounting base safely.

completion_evidence: Loosening continues around the detector edge.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The detector is still attached to the ceiling base.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Twist or release the detector fully from its base.

completion_evidence: The detector is detached and held below the empty mounting base.
The battery-compartment door is being pried open.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Old-battery removal and new-battery seating are not yet visible.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Open the compartment fully, remove the old battery, and seat the replacement correctly.

completion_evidence: The battery compartment is closed and the front test control is pressed.
The detector is twisted back onto its ceiling base.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The alarm response and normal power indication cannot be verified from the visible evidence.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Confirm the test response and normal power indication after remounting.

query: How do I install a key hook by the door?
task: Installing a key hook by the door
goal: Mount a level, secure key hook at a practical location beside the door.

steps.text: Choose the hook location, level the fixture, and mark its mounting point or points.
completion_cues: A suitable level location has clear mounting marks.
incompletion_cues: The location is undecided, unlevel, or unmarked.

steps.text: Prepare the marked mounting point with a pilot hole or wall anchor as needed.
completion_cues: The wall is prepared to accept the fastener.
incompletion_cues: The marked point is not prepared or the anchor is insecure.

steps.text: Position the hook and drive its fastener until the fixture is secure.
completion_cues: The hook is attached firmly to the wall.
incompletion_cues: The fixture is detached, loose, or only partly fastened.

steps.text: Check alignment and stability, then test the hook with keys.
completion_cues: The mounted hook stays level and supports keys without movement.
incompletion_cues: The hook needs tightening, leveling, or a load test.

completion_evidence: The decorative hook plaque has been picked up and the wall area beside the doorway is being inspected.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The plaque is not held against the chosen position and no mounting mark is visible.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Hold the plaque at a practical height, level it, and mark the mounting point.

completion_evidence: The plaque is held against the selected wall area and a red pencil mark is made along its upper mounting position.
The plaque and pencil are set back down after marking.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: No level check is visible before the plaque is removed from the wall.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Verify the marked position is level, correcting the mark if needed before drilling or anchoring.

completion_evidence: A phone level is held horizontally across the marked area.
Its display turns green and shows 0 degrees before the phone is set down.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The wall has not yet been prepared for a fastener.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Set the phone aside and prepare the verified mark with the appropriate hole or anchor.

completion_evidence: After using the phone for another activity, the person returns to the level and again obtains a green 0-degree reading at the marks.
A small wall fastener or anchor is placed at the mark and tapped repeatedly with a hammer.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The decorative hook plaque is still off the wall and the fastener preparation has not been visibly load-checked.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Confirm the fastener is seated correctly, position the plaque over it, and secure the fixture firmly.

query: How do I make a tissue paper flower?
task: Making a tissue paper flower
goal: Shape stacked tissue paper into a secured and evenly fluffed decorative flower.

steps.text: Stack and align the tissue paper layers.
completion_cues: Multiple tissue sheets form an aligned stack.
incompletion_cues: Sheets are separate or substantially misaligned.

steps.text: Accordion-fold the stacked tissue paper into an even strip.
completion_cues: The full stack is folded into repeated pleats.
incompletion_cues: A substantial portion remains unfolded or pleats are coming apart.

steps.text: Secure the center and prepare the folded ends for shaping.
completion_cues: The pleated strip is firmly bound at its center and ready to open.
incompletion_cues: The center is unsecured or the stack cannot retain its folds.

steps.text: Separate and fluff the layers into a balanced flower shape.
completion_cues: Tissue layers are opened into visible petals around the center.
incompletion_cues: Layers remain compressed or the flower is only partly opened.

completion_evidence: Purple and light-blue tissue sheets are on the table and are being layered and aligned.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The person is still repositioning separate sheets at the end of the interval.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Finish aligning the full stack, then begin even accordion folds along one edge.

completion_evidence: The alternating purple and light-blue sheets have been consolidated into one aligned stack.
A narrow pleat has been formed along the near edge.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Most of the sheet stack remains flat and unfolded.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Continue alternating the folds across the full stack with an even pleat width.

completion_evidence: The full tissue stack has been folded into a long, narrow accordion strip.
The person is pressing the final pleats flat and keeping their edges aligned.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The center has not yet been visibly tied or otherwise secured.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Bind the middle of the finished accordion strip firmly before opening the layers.

completion_evidence: The accordion strip is tied tightly at its center.
Purple and light-blue layers have been fanned out and many are separated into rounded petal sections.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The person is still separating and redistributing layers, and the two sides are not yet evenly fluffed.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Gently separate the remaining compressed layers and balance the petals around the secured center.

query: How do I sew on a button?
task: Sewing on a button
goal: Attach a button securely to fabric with thread.

steps.text: Gather the button, fabric, needle, thread, and scissors.
completion_cues: Required sewing materials are available
incompletion_cues: A required tool or material is missing

steps.text: Cut the thread, thread the needle, and secure the thread end.
completion_cues: Needle is threaded
Thread end is secured
incompletion_cues: Needle is unthreaded
Thread has no secured end

steps.text: Position the button and stitch repeatedly through its holes and the fabric.
completion_cues: Button is positioned correctly
Multiple securing stitches pass through fabric and button
incompletion_cues: Button is mispositioned
Too few stitches hold the button

steps.text: Tie off and trim the thread, then check that the button is secure.
completion_cues: Thread is tied off and trimmed
Button remains firmly attached
incompletion_cues: Thread end is loose
Button wobbles excessively

completion_evidence: Needle, thread spool, scissors, and other sewing materials are on the work mat.
Thread is being unwound from the spool.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Cut a usable thread length and thread the needle.

completion_evidence: The thread end is repeatedly aligned with the needle eye.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: A cut length and secured thread end are not yet visible.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Finish passing the thread through the eye, cut it, and knot the end.

completion_evidence: Thread is pulled through the needle and cut with scissors.
The thread end is manipulated into a knot.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Lay out the fabric and position the button.

completion_evidence: The checkered fabric lies flat and the button is positioned at the work area.
The needle passes repeatedly through the button and fabric.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Stitching is still in progress and the thread has not been tied off.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Complete the securing stitches, then tie off and trim the thread.

query: How do I fold underwear for drawer storage?
task: How to fold underwear for drawer storage
goal: Fold underwear into compact rectangles and arrange them neatly in a drawer.

steps.text: Lay a clean pair flat and smooth it.
completion_cues: Underwear lies flat and smooth
incompletion_cues: Pair is bunched or not positioned

steps.text: Fold the sides, crotch, and waistband into a compact rectangle.
completion_cues: Edges align in a compact rectangular fold
incompletion_cues: Fold is loose or irregular

steps.text: Repeat as needed and place folded pairs in the drawer.
completion_cues: Folded pairs are transferred into the drawer
incompletion_cues: Pairs remain unfolded or outside the drawer

steps.text: Align the stored pairs neatly and finish the drawer arrangement.
completion_cues: Pairs are upright or aligned neatly in the drawer
incompletion_cues: Drawer contents remain disordered

completion_evidence: A clean pair is taken from the clothing area and oriented by its waistband.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The pair remains held and bunched rather than flat.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Lay the pair flat on the bed and smooth it.

completion_evidence: Two pairs are laid side by side on the bed.
The waistbands and fabric are spread and smoothed.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Fold the first pair into a compact rectangle.

completion_evidence: After leaving the bed briefly, the user returns to the folding task.
One pair is compact, and the second waistband is folded down with its sides moving inward.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The second compact rectangle is not yet finished.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Finish aligning and folding the second pair into a rectangle.

completion_evidence: Both pairs are folded into compact rectangles and placed in the drawer.
After adjusting a clock, the user returns and resumes aligning the drawer contents.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The final drawer arrangement is still being adjusted at the interval end.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Finish aligning the pairs neatly and close the drawer.

query: How do I test GFCI outlets?
task: Testing GFCI outlets
goal: Test a GFCI outlet's trip and reset functions.

steps.text: Clear the outlet and verify that power is initially present.
completion_cues: Outlet is unobstructed
Tester indicates initial power
incompletion_cues: Outlet remains loaded
Initial power is unverified

steps.text: Reset the GFCI if needed and press its test button to trip it.
completion_cues: Test control trips the GFCI
incompletion_cues: GFCI does not trip

steps.text: Verify that outlet power is off while the GFCI is tripped.
completion_cues: Tester confirms no outlet power
incompletion_cues: Power remains present after the trip
Loss of power is unverified

steps.text: Press reset and verify that outlet power is restored.
completion_cues: GFCI resets
Tester confirms restored power
incompletion_cues: Reset does not latch
Power is not restored

completion_evidence: The target GFCI is located and its receptacles appear unobstructed.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Initial power has not been checked with a tester.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Use the voltage tester to verify initial power.

completion_evidence: An orange voltage tester is applied to both receptacles.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The tester result is not legible enough to confirm initial power.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Obtain a clear initial-power indication before tripping the GFCI.

completion_evidence: The tester is applied again to both receptacles and visibly illuminates at the outlet.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Press the GFCI test control to trip the outlet.

completion_evidence: The test and reset controls are pressed in sequence.
The tester is reapplied after the trip, and reset is pressed again near the end.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Restored power is not rechecked after the final reset press.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Reapply the tester after reset to confirm that power is restored.

query: How do I use commas correctly in a list?
task: Use commas correctly in a list
goal: Write and review a clear multi-item list with correctly placed commas and a consistent serial-comma choice.

steps.text: Write a sentence containing a series of three or more distinct items.
completion_cues: A complete multi-item series is present for punctuation.
incompletion_cues: The series is absent or has fewer than three items.

steps.text: Place commas between the listed items.
completion_cues: Each internal boundary between list items is punctuated.
incompletion_cues: Item boundaries are missing commas or commas split individual items.

steps.text: Handle the final conjunction and serial comma consistently.
completion_cues: The punctuation before the final conjunction follows a consistent intended style.
incompletion_cues: The last item boundary is ambiguous or inconsistent.

steps.text: Review the sentence for list clarity and punctuation errors.
completion_cues: The full series has been checked and reads unambiguously.
incompletion_cues: The written list has not been reviewed or still has visible punctuation issues.

completion_evidence: A notebook is opened to a blank page, a pen is picked up, and writing begins near the top of the page.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: No complete multi-item series is yet visible.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Write a complete sentence containing at least three distinct list items.

completion_evidence: A four-item series has been written across the first notebook line.
Visible comma marks separate the internal items and a comma appears before the final conjunction.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: No separate review pass has yet been observed.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Read the complete line back and verify every item boundary and the final conjunction punctuation.

completion_evidence: The four-item line remains complete in the notebook and the pen has been put down.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The person switches to a phone weather screen instead of reviewing the written punctuation.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Set the phone aside and review the written list item by item for missing or misplaced commas.

completion_evidence: After the weather and laptop diversions, the person returns to the notebook and points the pen along the existing item boundaries.
The written punctuation is revisited, additional notes or corrections are completed, and the pen is finally put down.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: none
